name: Brown Sugar Kisses
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Brown sugar, sifted and forced through coarse sieve with wooden spoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg white until stiff but not dry.
2. Add brown sugar and continue beating until thoroughly mixed.
3. Add vanilla and pecans and stir.
4. Drop by teaspoon onto a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 5-6 minutes in an oven preheated to 400F (200C).
6. Allow cookies to cool for 10 minutes before removing from the cookie sheet.
